title: Autopilot LoopState (schema_version 3)
description: LoopState schema bumped from version 2 to 3 to include phase_archetype. Snapshots with schema_version=2 (without phase_archetype) remain loadable; phase_archetype defaults to null and the version is updated to 3 on next save.

schema_version.description: 2 = legacy (loaded with phase_archetype=null); 3 = current (with phase_archetype field)

phase_archetype.description: Name of the archetype resolved for the current phase. Null when archetype resolution failed or for terminal/state-only phases.
